title: emilia sonchifolia var. lanceolata
intro: Emilia sonchifolia var. lanceolata, also known as Baishaoyao or Chinese baishaoyao, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb that has been used for centuries to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. Emilia sonchifolia var. lanceolata is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or powder for use in traditional Chinese medicine, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal preparations.
